description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The structure features a combination of flat and gable roofs, with the main section having a prominent gable and secondary sections with flat or slightly sloped roofs. Large, multi-pane windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is centrally located, accessible via a small set of steps, and is flanked by decorative columns and a modest overhang. A garage is attached to one side of the house, with a driveway leading up to it. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored stucco or painted masonry, with contrasting darker roofing materials.
description: A two-story house with gable and flat roofs, large symmetrical windows, a central entryway with columns, and an attached garage, surrounded by trees and a low fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, columns, and large windows, as well as the attached garage and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: Rear and side view highlighting the backyard area, additional landscaping, and the extended driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear facade, flat roof sections, and a more private garden area with dense tree coverage.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the length of the house, the arrangement of windows, and the transition between the main building and the garage.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, decorative columns, and a modest overhang
